title: hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. subcinereum
intro: Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. subcinereum, also known as a subspecies of the hawkweed plant, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. subcinereum include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. subcinereum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
